task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Acura MDX (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $51200.00 and wholesale is $39640.00. Product features: Luxury three-row SUV with Super Handling All-Wheel Drive. Reference: https://www.acura.com/mdx

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Acura MDX. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Acura MDX. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
